sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36814" key="e)cantlhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξαντλ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n36814.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must douche,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:13:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
